title: Tao Te Ching 3
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 3 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 3 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Not exalting the worthy keeps the people from rivalry. Not prizing rare goods keeps the people from stealing.
